headline: Writes docs for developers and accountants, defines standards, and builds the documentation toolchain.

headline: Focuses on redefining how technical documentation is created, delivered, and experienced across the organization. Challenges long-standing assumptions, helps engineering teams take greater ownership of source documentation, and explores how documentation can become more useful inside the product experience.
summary: These samples reflect work designing a documentation system, including structured reference content, workflow-driven tasks, and conceptual explanations. They are part of a larger system designed to support developer workflows across onboarding, application or platform development, and deployment.
